rows.CNzh:
<Size=80><unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>乖乖<Color=red>耐火蜥蜴<Color=white>～
快出来吧～<unk[1:0:30 0]>嗯？<Size=100>
rows.JPja:
<Size=80><unk[3:0:7]><Color=red><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>ヒケシトカゲ<Color=white>ちゃ～ん
<Ruby={2:2}で>出ておいで～<unk[1:0:30 0]> …ん？<Size=100>

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>啊，不好意思。
我刚才一心想着<Color=red>耐火蜥蜴<Color=white>……
找我有什么事吗？
我现在有点忙……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>啊，抱歉。
我滿腦子都在想<Color=red>耐火蜥蜴<Color=white>的事……
所以你找我嗎？
不過我現在有點忙就是了……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>ああ すみません
<Color=red>ヒケシトカゲ<Color=white>に<Ruby={4:8}むちゅう>夢中になってしまって…
で <Ruby={4:6}じぶん>自分に<Ruby={2:4}なに>何か？
<Ruby={2:4}いま>今ちょっと<Ruby={2:6}いそが>忙しいんですが…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>Oh, didn't see you there. I've got <Color=red>fireproof
lizards<Color=white> on the brain.

So, uh...did you need something?
I'm kinda busy.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>这里距离<Color=red>巢穴<Color=white>近，
确实是个比较理想的捕捉地点。
但这里是我先发现的，

如果你也想捕捉<Color=red>耐火蜥蜴<Color=white>，
可以麻烦你换个地方吗？
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>我覺得這個離牠們<Color=red>巢穴<Color=white>很近的地方
是個相當不錯的地點……
不過這個地方是我先找到的。

所以如果你是想捉<Color=red>耐火蜥蜴<Color=white>的話，
我就得請你到別的地方捉了。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><Color=red><Ruby={4:6}すあな>巣穴<Color=white>も<Ruby={2:4}ちか>近いこの<Ruby={4:6}ばしょ>場所は
けっこう いいポイントだと<Ruby={2:4}おも>思うんですが
ここは <Ruby={4:6}じぶん>自分が<Ruby={2:4}さき>先に<Ruby={2:2}み>見つけた<Ruby={4:6}ばしょ>場所ですし<Color=red>

ヒケシトカゲ<Color=white>を<Ruby={2:4}つか>捕まえたいなら
<Ruby={2:4}べつ>別の<Ruby={4:6}ばしょ>場所でお<Ruby={2:4}ねが>願いしますよ？
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>Yeah. This is a good spot, since it's close
to their <Color=red>burrow<Color=white>.<PageBreak>I found it first.<PageBreak>If you want to catch<Color=red> fireproof lizards<Color=white>,
maybe do it elsewhere?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>耐火蜥蜴是
制作<Color=red>防火药<Color=white>的材料。
耐火装备实在太贵了，我买不起。
但是抓野生的耐火蜥蜴可不用钱！
<unk[3:0:12]>那些家伙的<Color=red>巢穴<Color=white>好像在<Color=red>洞窟中<Color=white>，
所以我是想去洞窟里面抓的，
但是那里面炎热异常，不做好耐火措施的话，
海利亚人根本无法承受。
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>对了，如果小哥你也想抓耐火蜥蜴，
记得一定要离远一些！
那些小家伙戒心十足，<Color=red>
对脚步声十分敏感<Color=white>。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>耐火蜥蜴
是用來製作<Color=red>防火藥<Color=white>的材料喔。
雖然耐火裝備的高昂價格讓我買不下手，
但野生的耐火蜥蜴可是免錢的！
<unk[3:0:12]>牠們的<Color=red>巢穴<Color=white>似乎就在<Color=red>洞窟之中<Color=white>，
所以那裡就是我的目標。
不過洞窟裡面熱氣沖天，
海利亞人不用耐火裝備的話可是連一秒都待不住。
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>啊，如果大哥你也是來捉耐火蜥蜴的話，
要盡可能地保持距離喔。
因為牠們的戒心非常強，
對<Color=red>腳步聲相當敏感<Color=white>的。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]>ヒケシトカゲは
<Color=red><Ruby={2:2}も>燃えず<Ruby={2:4}やく>薬<Color=white>の<Ruby={4:10}ざいりょう>材料なんですよ
<Ruby={8:12}たいかそうび>耐火装備は<Ruby={2:4}たか>高くて <Ruby={4:6}じぶん>自分には<Ruby={2:2}て>手が<Ruby={2:2}だ>出せませんが
<Ruby={4:6}やせい>野生のヒケシトカゲなら タダですから！
<unk[3:0:12]><Ruby={2:4}やつ>奴らの<Color=red><Ruby={4:6}すあな>巣穴<Color=white>は<Color=red> <Ruby={4:8}どうくつ>洞窟の<Ruby={2:4}なか>中<Color=white>にあるみたいなんで
そっちを<Ruby={2:4}ねら>狙いたいところなんですが
<Ruby={4:8}どうくつ>洞窟の<Ruby={2:4}なか>中は <Ruby={4:6}ねっき>熱気ムンムンで<Ruby={8:14}たいかたいさく>耐火対策ナシでは
ハイリア<Ruby={2:4}じん>人は ひとたまりもありませんからね
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>あっ お<Ruby={2:4}にい>兄さん ヒケシトカゲ<Ruby={2:4}つか>捕まえるなら
できれば<Ruby={2:4}とお>遠くでお<Ruby={2:4}ねが>願いしますよ
<Ruby={2:4}やつ>奴らは <Ruby={6:12}けいかいしん>警戒心が<Ruby={2:4}つよ>強くて<Color=red>
<Ruby={4:8}あしおと>足音にかなり<Ruby={4:8}びんかん>敏感<Color=white>ですから
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>Fireproof lizards are a key ingredient for
<Color=red>fireproof elixirs<Color=white>, you see.

Fireproof equipment is so pricey that
I can't afford it, but fireproof lizards?
They don't cost a thing.
<unk[3:0:12]>It seems like their <Color=red>burrow <Color=white>is <Color=red>inside the
cave<Color=white>, and that's where I'd like to get to.

But the cave is sweltering hot. A Hylian
like you or me wouldn't last long without 
appropriate defenses.
<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>Oh, do me a favor, buddy. If you're after
the lizards too, please go catch them
somewhere else.
They're always on high alert, and they're
<Color=red>really sensitive to footsteps<Color=white>.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>要是我也能有
小哥手里这种耐火装备就好了，
但是价格实在太高了，我买不起。

所以我才要捕捉
作为制作<Color=red>防火药<Color=white>材料的耐火蜥蜴！
<unk[3:0:12]>那些家伙的<Color=red>巢穴<Color=white>好像在<Color=red>洞窟中<Color=white>，

对脚步声十分敏感<Color=white>。

可以用來製作<Color=red>防火藥<Color=white>的耐火蜥蜴！
<unk[3:0:12]>牠們的<Color=red>巢穴<Color=white>似乎就在<Color=red>洞窟之中<Color=white>，

不過洞窟裡面熱氣沖天，

rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>I wish I had fireproof gear like you
do, buddy.

But it's out of my price range...


If you're wondering, I'm out here catching
fireproof lizards so I can brew a<Color=red> fireproof
elixir <Color=white>or two.
<unk[3:0:12]>I've figured out that their <Color=red>burrow <Color=white>is <Color=red>inside
the cave<Color=white>, so I want to get in there and get
to work.
Problem is, the cave is absolutely
sweltering, and a Hylian like me
wouldn't last long in there.
<unk[3:0:263]><unk[4:0:18 78 111 116 105 99 101 95 48 48]>Even so...if you're after fireproof
lizards, please do me a favor and go
catch elsewhere.
These lizards are always on high alert and
are <Color=red>really sensitive to footsteps<Color=white>, so the
less feet there are here, the better.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>耐火装备价格实在太高了，
我根本买不起。
但自己抓耐火蜥蜴
来制作<Color=red>防火药<Color=white>几乎不花钱，
所以我才像这样<Color=red>蹑手蹑脚<Color=white>地
捕捉那些家伙呢！
<unk[3:0:12]>其实我是想去
<Color=red>洞窟中<Color=white>的巢穴抓它们的，
<unk[3:0:263]>但洞窟里面炎热异常，不做好耐火措施的话，
我们海利亚人根本进不去。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:7]>雖然耐火裝備的高昂價格
讓我買不下手……
但是只要捉野生的耐火蜥蜴來製作<Color=red>防火藥<Color=white>
就幾乎不用花到錢了。
捉耐火蜥蜴時得像這樣
<Color=red>完全隱藏腳步聲<Color=white>悄悄地出手。
<unk[3:0:12]>其實牠們在<Color=red>洞窟之中<Color=white>的巢穴
才是我本來的目標。
<unk[3:0:263]>但是沒有耐火裝備的話，
洞窟裡根本就熱到沒辦法讓我們這些海利亞人進去。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:7]><Ruby={8:12}たいかそうび>耐火装備は<Ruby={4:6}こうか>高価で

<Ruby={4:8}どうくつ>洞窟の<Ruby={2:4}なか>中には<Ruby={2:4}あつ>熱すぎて<Ruby={2:4}はい>入れませんからね
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:7]>Fireproof gear is way out of my
price range...

But it's basically free to catch a wild
fireproof lizard to make it into a
<Color=red>fireproof elixir<Color=white>.
So I'm taking extra care and making sure
my <Color=red>footsteps don't make noise <Color=white>so I go
home with a good haul today.
<unk[3:0:12]>Ideally, I'd root around their burrow <Color=red>inside
of the cave<Color=white>.

<unk[3:0:263]>But without any fireproof gear, it's way
too hot for Hylians like us to last long
in there.

<unk[3:0:7]>I wish I had fireproof gear like you do,
buddy. But it's out of my price range.

But it's basically free to catch a wild
fireproof lizard to make it into a
<Color=red>fireproof elixir<Color=white>.
So I'm taking extra care and making sure
my <Color=red>footsteps don't make noise <Color=white>so I go
home with a good haul today.
<unk[3:0:12]>Ideally, I'd root around their burrow <Color=red>inside
of the cave<Color=white>.

<unk[3:0:263]>But without any fireproof gear, it's way
too hot for Hylians like us to last long
in there.
